backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that includes a blob storage mixin and exposes a simple healthCheck query function returning a status string.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to their human-readable summaries, serving as a documentation index for all frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with full meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical URL, geo tags, and JSON-LD structured data targeting the production domain verdiercouverture.fr.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Google Search Console HTML verification file containing the required google-site-verification meta tag and body content.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the production sitemap at https://verdiercouverture.fr/sitemap.xml.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the production URL https://verdiercouverture.fr/ with monthly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders all landing page sections (Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) each wrapped in an ErrorBoundary to isolate render failures.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying company description, a strengths list with icons, stat counters, and a quality icon image with graceful error fallback.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a devis form that validates inputs and opens a pre-filled mailto link to sv.couverture95@gmail.com, showing a confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details (phone, email, location), service links, navigation links, intervention zones, and a copyright notice for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, trust badges, and two phone CTA buttons plus a scroll-to-contact button for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, two phone CTAs, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that changes style on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: Displays VERDIER COUVERTURE's geographic coverage with a tag cloud of ~40 Val-d'Oise cities and a list of service keywords for SEO purposes.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of six service cards (roofing, tiling, zinc work, insulation, repairs, cleaning), each with a lazy-loaded image, description, and feature bullet points.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of six hardcoded customer testimonials for VERDIER COUVERTURE with star ratings and Schema.org Review markup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useHealthCheck hook that calls the backend actor's healthCheck method via React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining Tailwind base/components/utilities layers, OKLCH-based brand color tokens (terracotta, charcoal, offwhite), and reusable component classes for the roofing site theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with brand colors (terracotta, charcoal, offwhite), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Verdier Couverture tracking a pending fix request (AR-1) to replace all draft subdomain URLs with the production domain https://verdiercouverture.fr.
